1734850.name: Story of Nararale
1734850.description:
Story of Nararale is a 2.5D turn-based tactical game focused on Quick Time Events (QTEs). You play as a soldier fighting in an arena to prove yourself and break free from captivity.

Gameplay

  • Choose and deploy characters: Command your characters and coordinate every move to defeat the enemy.

  • Character turns: Each character acts on its own turn. Individual stats determine turn order.

  • Skill development: Upgrade characters via a passive skill tree and train active skills to increase their potential.

  • Attack bar: Press with precise timing to hit the target and maximize damage. Higher-tier skills demand greater accuracy.

  • Action management: Each character has action points that refill every turn. Allocate them to match your playstyle.

  • Directional damage: Attack direction matters. From the front you can counter, dodge, or block; from behind you cannot block or dodge.

  • Fog of war: Unexplored areas are hidden. Scout to reveal the map and adapt your battle plan.

  • 2D characters in a 3D world: 2D pixel-art characters fight in a 3D world with varied terrain and multi-level maps.
